MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Jennifer J. Hagan, Esq., for Plaintiff: Girlfriends Magazine, LLC., a California LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Heather Findlay and Erin Findlay, were sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Scott Wazlowski.
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgment and submit brief in support to this Dept. by Jan. 31, 2006.

Feb. 6, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc. for details of Judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant Scott Wazlowski for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Defendant in Propria Persona sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. Mtn For Sanctions Against Wazlowski, Costs, Attys Fees & Memo Of Pts & Auth
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion for discovery sanctions is ordered off calendar as it was not timely served. CCP 1005 requires that motions be filed and served at least 16 court days before the hearing. CCP 1013(c) provides that service by express mail or other method of overnight delivery extends the period of notice by two court days. The instant motion was served and filed on November 16 and November 17, 2005 respectively. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
